calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Joel Ruiz, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Karla Guadalupe Ruiz, was sworn and examined.
The Court denied the petition for Change of Name for improper venue without prejudice. Petitioner resides in San Mateo County. Decree signed in open court.
